_provenance.total_gpu_hours: Actual nnUNet 5-fold training time aggregated from cluster job logs
_provenance.cost_per_hour_gbp: Contemporary on-demand cloud GPU pricing (assumption; pre-tax, pre-overhead)
_provenance.n_folds: Number of cross-validation folds in the training pipeline
_provenance.calendar_hours_per_year: Used to convert measured GPU-hours into model-equivalent calendar years
_provenance.working_hours_per_year: Standard UK clinical full-time-equivalent assumption used to convert radiologist career years into hours-equivalent for paragraph 121
